name: Cheese and Rice Casserole Ada
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Pour into a lightly oiled casserole dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes.
one serving = 2 bread exchanges + 1 lean meat + 1/2 milk exchange
235 cal, 35 CHO, 14 PRO, 4 fat, 682 Na, 203 K, 10 Cholest
